title: Swarm review findings
description: Shared findings shape every swarm backend normalizes into. Enforced on codex via `codex exec --output-schema` and on grok via `--json-schema`, so the ensemble merge receives uniform JSON. All item fields are required (strict structured-output modes reject optional properties); use line=0 and confidence as honest defaults rather than omitting.

file.description: Repo-relative path of the file the finding is in

line.description: 1-indexed line the finding anchors to; 0 for file-level findings

severity.description: critical = correctness/security defect; warning = likely problem or risky pattern; minor = cleanup/style

failure_scenario.description: Concrete inputs/state leading to wrong output or crash. Must be falsifiable — this is what the verifier tests. For style findings: the concrete maintenance cost.

confidence.description: Reviewer's own confidence that the finding is real

recommendation.description: Suggested fix in one or two sentences
